objects.name: FBI director Kash Patel’s brand website taken offline after malware reports
objects.description: FBI director site went offline after a hack used a fake Cloudflare page to trick users into running a ClickFix attack that installed malware. The merchandise website of FBI director Kash Patel (basedapparel[.]com) was taken offline on Friday after reports that it had been compromised by hackers using it to spread malware.

external_references.description: FBI director Kash Patel’s brand website taken offline after malware reports
